templates.mjml: <mjml><mj-head><mj-title>{{subject}}</mj-title><mj-preview>{{previewText}}</mj-preview><mj-attributes><mj-all font-family="Arial, sans-serif" /><mj-text color="#1f2937" font-size="16px" line-height="24px" /><mj-button background-color="#f46d4c" color="#ffffff" border-radius="6px" /></mj-attributes></mj-head><mj-body background-color="#f5f7fb"><mj-section padding="24px 0"><mj-column><mj-text align="center" font-size="24px" font-weight="700" color="#111827">{{headline}}</mj-text><mj-text align="center" color="#4b5563">{{message}}</mj-text></mj-column></mj-section><mj-section background-color="#ffffff" border-radius="8px" padding="24px"><mj-column><mj-text font-size="18px" font-weight="600" color="#111827">What happens next</mj-text><mj-text color="#4b5563">Use this quick update to guide people through the next step in your flow.</mj-text><mj-button href="https://example.com">Open details</mj-button></mj-column></mj-section><mj-section padding="16px 0 0 0"><mj-column><mj-text align="center" font-size="12px" color="#9ca3af">You receive this email because you are part of this workflow.</mj-text></mj-column></mj-section></mj-body></mjml>

{{subject}}{{previewText}}Node-RED UpdateFlow {{flowName}} changed at {{updatedAt}}{{headline}}{{message}}Node: {{nodeName}}
Status: {{status}}Open Node-REDGenerated by your Node-RED automation flow.

{{subject}}{{previewText}}Weekly KPI report{{message}}Revenue progress84% of monthly targetRetention rate71% retained usersPipeline coverage63% of target pipelineMetricCurrentDeltaMRR$42,300+8.2%Churn2.1%-0.4%NPS47+5Open full dashboard

<mjml><mj-head><mj-title>{{subject}}</mj-title><mj-preview>{{previewText}}</mj-preview></mj-head><mj-body background-color="#ffffff"><mj-section padding="40px 20px 10px 20px"><mj-column><mj-text align="center" font-size="12px" letter-spacing="1px" color="#94a3b8">ANNOUNCEMENT</mj-text><mj-text align="center" font-size="30px" line-height="36px" color="#0f172a" font-weight="700">{{headline}}</mj-text><mj-text align="center" color="#475569">{{message}}</mj-text></mj-column></mj-section><mj-section padding="0 20px 30px 20px"><mj-column><mj-button background-color="#0f172a" color="#ffffff" href="https://example.com">Learn more</mj-button></mj-column></mj-section></mj-body></mjml>
